name: tavily_search_tool
description:
A powerful web search tool that provides comprehensive, real-time results using Tavily's AI search engine

---

**BEST PRACTICES:**

            - Use specific terms rather than generic ones (e.g., 'climate change impacts on coral reefs' vs 'climate change')
            - Add contextual information to disambiguate terms (e.g., 'python programming language' vs 'python snake')
            - For exact phrase matching, use quotes in your query
            - Keep queries concise but informative - focus on key terms
            - Keep your query under 400 characters for efficient processing
            - Break complex questions into multiple focused sub-queries and send them as separate requests
            - Use 'topic': 'news' for current events, 'general' for broader knowledge
            - For time-sensitive topics, use 'time_range' parameter to get recent information
            - Use 'basic' search_depth for quick searches (1 credit), 'advanced' for comprehensive research (10 credits)
            - With search_depth=advanced, setting include_raw_content=true can increase retrieval precision
            - Use 'include_domains' to focus on trusted sources for specific topics (minimize the number of domains)
            - Use 'exclude_domains' to filter out irrelevant domains from your results
            - When working with news, use 'days' parameter to specify how many days back to include
            - For post-processing, consider using metadata like score, title, and content for better results
            - For extracting specific information, consider a two-step process: search first, then extract
            

**PARAMETER GUIDELINES:**
- query: Be specific and include contextual information. For exact phrases, use quotes in your query string.
- search_depth: Use 'basic' for quick searches (1 credit), 'advanced' for comprehensive research (10 credits).
- topic: Use 'news' for current events, 'general' for broader knowledge.
- days: Useful when topic='news' to specify how many days back to search.
- time_range: Alternative time filter using 'day', 'week', 'month', or 'year'.
- include_domains: Focus search on specific trusted domains (e.g., ['nature.com', 'bbc.com']).
- exclude_domains: Exclude specific domains from search results (e.g., ['pinterest.com']).
- max_results: Adjust between 5-20 to control how many results are returned.

**EXAMPLES:**
Example 1: News Search
Description: Search for recent news articles
Parameters: {'query': 'Latest AI developments', 'topic': 'news', 'days': 3}
Explanation: Searches for AI news from the past 3 days

Example 2: Academic Research
Description: Focus on academic or scholarly content
Parameters: {'query': 'recent advancements in quantum computing', 'include_domains': ['nature.com', 'science.org', 'arxiv.org'], 'time_range': 'year'}
Explanation: Focuses on scholarly content about quantum computing from academic sources within the last year

Example 3: Product Comparison
Description: Research product comparisons effectively
Parameters: {'query': 'iPhone 15 Pro vs Samsung Galaxy S23 Ultra camera comparison', 'exclude_domains': ['pinterest.com', 'quora.com'], 'time_range': 'month'}
Explanation: Targets specific product comparison while excluding less reliable sources

what_is_your_intent.description: Describe your intent for using Tavily
what_is_your_intent.title: What Is Your Intent

search_depth.description: The depth of the search ('basic' or 'advanced')
search_depth.title: Search Depth

topic.description: The category of the search ('general' or 'news')
topic.title: Topic

days.description: Number of days back to include in search results (only for 'news' topic)
days.title: Days

include_domains.description: List of domains to specifically include in search results
include_domains.title: Include Domains

exclude_domains.description: List of domains to specifically exclude from search results
exclude_domains.title: Exclude Domains

include_answer.description: Whether to include an answer summary generated by an LLM
include_answer.title: Include Answer

include_raw_content.description: Whether to include the cleaned and parsed HTML content of each result
include_raw_content.title: Include Raw Content

include_images.description: Whether to include images from search results
include_images.title: Include Images

include_image_descriptions.description: Whether to include descriptions with images
include_image_descriptions.title: Include Image Descriptions

max_results.description: Maximum number of results to return (5-20)
max_results.title: Max Results

async_search.description: Whether to perform the search asynchronously
async_search.title: Async Search
